specs.title: should have no critical WCAG 2.1 AA violations on the home page
should have no serious WCAG 2.1 AA violations on the home page
should have proper document structure on the home page
should have no critical WCAG 2.1 AA violations on the login page
should have accessible form controls on the login page
should have sufficient color contrast on the login page
should have no critical WCAG 2.1 AA violations on the dashboard
should have accessible navigation on the dashboard
should have keyboard-navigable interactive elements on the dashboard
should report total violation count on dashboard for tracking
should have no critical WCAG 2.1 AA violations on the listings page
should have accessible listing cards with proper headings
should have accessible filter/search controls on listings page
should have accessible images on listing cards
should have no critical WCAG 2.1 AA violations on the settings page
should have accessible form controls on the settings page
should have proper heading hierarchy on the settings page
should have keyboard-accessible settings controls
should report total violation count on settings page for tracking
should have consistent skip-to-content link across pages
should have proper ARIA landmarks on all critical pages
should log in as admin and reach admin dashboard
should navigate from admin dashboard to user management
should show user management page with correct heading
should display a table or list of users
should display user details in table rows (name, email, role, status)
should display pagination controls when many users exist
should navigate to next page when pagination is available
should have a search input on the user management page
should filter user list when typing in search
should show empty state when search yields no results
should clear search and restore full user list
should open user detail/edit page from user list
should display editable user profile fields
should have a save/update button on user edit form
should display role selector on user edit page
should show available roles (member, admin, broker)
should confirm role change with a confirmation dialog
should display user status indicator (active/suspended)
should have suspend action button on user edit page
should show confirmation dialog before suspending a user
should have activate action for suspended users
should return user list from admin API
should support search parameter in admin users API
should support pagination parameters in admin users API
should navigate to federation hub from main navigation
should load federation hub page with hero section
should display federation feature tabs or navigation
should show federation status indicator
should display partner communities on federation hub
should show partner community details (name, member count, status)
should allow clicking a partner community for details
should navigate to federation directory page
should display search/filter controls in the directory
should display member cards from partner communities
should show community provenance badge on federated members
should filter directory by partner community
should navigate to federated listings page
should display listing cards from partner communities
should have offer/request type filter for federated listings
should show origin community on federated listing cards
should navigate to listing detail from federated listings
should navigate to federated events page
should display event cards from partner communities
should show event details (date, location, community)
should show origin community badge on federated events
should navigate to event detail from federated events list
should support filtering federated events by date or community
should return federation status from API
should return partner list from API
should return federated directory from API
